items.question: What is a Trading Journal and why do I need one?
items.answer: A trading journal is a tool used to log and track the details of your trades. It helps you keep a historical record of your performance, identify patterns, learn from past mistakes, and build consistency and discipline in your trading.

items.question: Is this website free to use?
items.answer: Yes, the platform is completely free. It is a personal project built entirely on my own initiative to practice application development and assist in the process of learning how to trade.

items.question: Is my trading data stored securely?
items.answer: Yes, your privacy is protected. All logged positions and trading history are kept secure and are strictly used for your own personal tracking and analysis.

items.question: Does this website provide financial advice or trading signals?
items.answer: No. This platform does not provide financial advice, market recommendations, or trading signals. It serves solely as an analytical tool to log and evaluate your own independent trades.

items.question: What type of trading asset and strategy is this journal focused on?
items.answer: The primary focus of this journal is futures and forex trading, with a core emphasis on the ICT (Inner Circle Trader) concepts, allowing you to log and analyze your setups based on this specific methodology.

items.question: Can I contact the author for feedback?
items.answer: Absolutely! Since this is an ongoing project, any feedback, feature suggestions, or bug reports are highly valuable and welcome. You can reach out through the contact section.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Trading Journal collects only the minimal personal data you voluntarily provide through a contact form, including:
privacy.intro2: This data is used only to get in touch with you, share information about Trading Journal's services, and continue the conversation.
commitments: Does not collect banking or payment card details
Does not process payments through the website
Does not share personal data with third parties
Stores your data securely and does not use it for other purposes without your prior consent
privacy.rights: You may request deletion or correction of your data at any time by writing to kilasonialuka@gmail.com.
privacy.acknowledgment: By submitting a form, you confirm that you have read and agree to Trading Journal's Privacy Policy and Terms & Conditions.

aboutMe.title: About Me
paragraphs: Welcome! This platform is a personal Trading Journal, built with two main goals in mind: achieving professional growth in development and mastering the art of trading.
As a developer, I built this free project entirely on my own initiative to sharpen my frontend skills and gain hands-on experience in application development.

At the same time, this website serves as my personal trading companion. It allows me to log my opened positions, track my ongoing records, and deeply analyze my performance. By reviewing the entries, I can easily identify my good and bad trading days, analyze my mistakes, and consistently refine my trading strategy.

riskDisclaimer.title: Risk Disclaimer
paragraphs: All information, material, and content presented on Trading Journal is intended for educational purposes only.
Trading involves substantial financial risk and may result in the partial or complete loss of capital.
Past results, examples, or achievements do not guarantee future results.
Trading Journal does not guarantee any profit, income, or success.
All decisions are made at the user's own personal responsibility.
Trading Journal is not liable for financial decisions made by users or any resulting losses.
Trading Journal is not a registered broker, investment adviser, fund manager, or financial institution.
Trading Journal does not manage user capital, does not make investments on a user's behalf, and does not provide personalized financial or investment advice.
All outcomes are individual and depend on the user's knowledge, experience, discipline, and risk management.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: This platform is a personal trading journal and is intended solely for informational and educational purposes. By using this website, you agree to the following terms:

items.heading: Personal Use
items.body: This is a free tool designed for individual trading analysis and development practice.

items.heading: Disclaimer of Liability
items.body: The information logged or displayed on this site does not constitute financial advice. The author of this platform is not responsible for any financial decisions, trading outcomes, profits, or losses incurred by the user.

items.heading: Data Usage
items.body: Your logged positions and trading history are used strictly for your own personal tracking and analysis.

items.heading: Modifications
items.body: As this is an ongoing project, the features and functionality of the site may be updated or modified at any time.

footer.disclaimer: Futures and forex trading involve significant risk and are not suitable for every investor. An investor could potentially lose all or more than their initial investment. Risk capital is money that can be lost without jeopardizing one's financial security or lifestyle. Only risk capital should be used for trading, and only those with sufficient risk capital should consider trading. Past performance is not necessarily indicative of future results.
